name: updateDraft
description: Replaces the contents of an existing Gmail draft. The new contents fully overwrite the old draft (this is a full replace, not a patch). Use this when iterating on an AI-composed draft before sending.

draftId.description: The Gmail draft ID to update.

to.description: Recipient email address, or an array of recipient email addresses.

body.description: New plain-text body of the draft.

replyToMessageId.description: Optional Gmail message ID to thread the draft with.
